title: SpaceX 已向 SEC 递交保密 IPO 申请，承销商名单曝光
summary: 知情人士透露，SpaceX 于 4 月 1 日正式提交保密 IPO 申请，高盛与摩根士丹利担任联席主承销商，目标估值区间 $3500 亿–$4000 亿美元，S-1 最快 5 月初公开。

title: The White House is asking OpenAI to slow roll the release of its new model over safety concerns
summary: penAI reportedly plans to share its newest model, GPT 5.6, with a select group of partners instead of to the broader public. The reason: the Trump administration told it to.

summary: Intellectual property network Story Protocol has shifted its focus to a new opportunity in training data for artificial intelligence.

title: Anthropic’s Claude is winning over paid consumers, a market owned by ChatGPT

title: SBI to acquire Bitbank in $289M deal creating Japan's biggest crypto exchange
summary: The Japanese financial conglomerate plans to take full control of Bitbank as it expands an ecosystem spanning crypto trading, stablecoins, tokenization and blockchain infrastructure.

title: Kalshi Seeks $40B Valuation Weeks After $1B Raise: FT
summary: The prediction market seeks a valuation near double the $22 billion it hit last month, as a federal-state fight over regulation escalates.

title: Aave Token Could Climb 50x by End of 2030, Standard Chartered Says—Here's Why
summary: Bitcoin to $500K, Ethereum to $40K, and Aave to $3,500 by the end of 2030? Standard Chartered just laid out some bullish price targets.
